name: vscode-agent-budget-monitor
description: Show remaining AI agent budget for Codex, Claude Code, and GitHub Copilot inside VS Code.

agent-budget-claude.description: Claude icon for Agent Budget Monitor

agent-budget-codex.description: Codex icon for Agent Budget Monitor

agent-budget-copilot.description: GitHub Copilot icon for Agent Budget Monitor

agentBudgetMonitor.refreshIntervalSecond.description: How often provider data is refreshed.

agentBudgetMonitor.warningThresholdPerce.description: Percent used at which a provider enters warning state.

agentBudgetMonitor.criticalThresholdPerc.description: Percent used at which a provider enters critical state.

agentBudgetMonitor.debug.useMockData.description: Use built-in mock datasets instead of live provider data for UI preview and debugging.

agentBudgetMonitor.debug.dataset.description: Select which built-in mock dataset to render when debug.useMockData is enabled.

agentBudgetMonitor.providers.codex.enabl.description: Enable the Codex adapter after it has been registered.

agentBudgetMonitor.providers.claude.enab.description: Enable the Claude adapter after it has been registered.

agentBudgetMonitor.providers.copilot.ena.description: Enable the Copilot adapter after it has been registered.

agentBudgetMonitor.providers.codex.sessi.description: Root directory for Codex session files.

agentBudgetMonitor.providers.claude.tran.description: Directories to scan for Claude local data.

agentBudgetMonitor.providers.claude.plan.description: Claude plan used to convert local usage into a percent.

agentBudgetMonitor.providers.claude.cust.description: Custom token limit used when Claude plan is set to custom.
